title: HMCS Beauharnois
summary:
Several units of the Royal Canadian Navy that have been named HMCS Beauharnois.

HMCS Beauharnois (K662) (I), a River-class frigate renamed Prestonian before commissioning, that served in the Battle of the Atlantic during the Second World War.
HMCS Beauharnois (K540) (II), a Flower-class corvette that served in the Battle of the Atlantic during the Second World War.
text:
Several units of the Royal Canadian Navy that have been named HMCS Beauharnois.

HMCS Beauharnois (K662) (I), a River-class frigate renamed Prestonian before commissioning, that served in the Battle of the Atlantic during the Second World War.
HMCS Beauharnois (K540) (II), a Flower-class corvette that served in the Battle of the Atlantic during the Second World War.

Battle honours
Atlantic, 1944–45
